name: job-hunter-auth-test
notes:
FR11: this flow MUST NOT log into Upwork, LinkedIn, or OnlineJobs.ph. Public RSS / public listings only. LinkedIn ingest is email-parse only. This is the canonical auth-test flow; Stories 7.2/7.3/7.4 copy this shape.

Contract: docs/n8n-contract.md. Required env vars: INGEST_BASE_URL, INGEST_SHARED_TOKEN. Hosting-agnostic: uses only Manual Trigger + Function + HTTP Request nodes — no Execute Command, no browser-automation node, no filesystem-only node.
